chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Charity

text: 1735 - وَ قَالَ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «صَدَقَةُ اَلسِّرِّ تُطْفِئُ غَضَبَ اَلرَّبِّ جَلَّ جَلاَلُهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1735 - The Prophet (sw), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Charity given in secret extinguishes the wrath of the Lord (azj), majestic and exalted is He."
